title: tephrosia heydeana
intro: Tephrosia heydeana is a perennial legume native to tropical Africa, commonly known as the 'Coral Tree'. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels. Herbal preparations of Tephrosia heydeana are often made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
